meaning: adj.腿过长的,有优美的腿的
examples: He was six feet four, all lanky and leggy.
The leggy beauty was none other than Naomi Campbell.
Leggy models and a child acrobat wait offstage at a pop music concert in Ulaanbaatar.
It was an insanely leggy blockbuster right on the cusp of an era of massive front-loading.
Gareth Barry looked very leggy and got caught in possession countless times, Frank Lampard the same.
